title: Rainbow Portals
description: Makes the nether portal  render all the colors of the rainbow.
body:
🌈 Rainbow Portals
An animated, shader-friendly Nether portal experience.

Rainbow Emissive Portals transforms the vanilla Nether portal into a mesmerizing, fully animated strip that cycles smoothly through the colors of the rainbow. Designed specifically for Minecraft 1.21, this pack uses per-frame emissive PBR maps to synchronize glowing colors with the portal’s animation — perfect for shader users on Iris + Complementary Unbound or similar packs.

✨ Features:
- Full-spectrum rainbow animation
 
- Seamless emission syncing using RME (Roughness, Metalness, Emission) maps
 
- Designed for Iris shaders, fully compatible with OptiFine-style emissive textures
 
- Lightweight and purely visual — no gameplay changes
 

🧱 Requirements:
Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.X

Shader mod (e.g., Iris) with PBR support

Complementary Unbound or any pack that honors emission maps
